title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Alstom India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Alstom India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Alstom India Holdings Services in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India Holdings Services:
Alstom India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
